\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Provides methods for finite element operations in 2D. 

This class includes static methods for calculating gradients of basis functions and integrals for P1 triangles in 2D finite element analysis.

Reference Tri3 and Quad4 element in \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}} \begin{DoxyVerb}          0 o                    1 o . . . . o 0
           . .                     .         .
          .   .                    .         .
         .     .                   .         .
      1 o  . .  o 2              2 o . . . . o 3
\end{DoxyVerb}

\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_ad59dfc10bf0ff2df6cefb3366c6efbfb}\label{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_ad59dfc10bf0ff2df6cefb3366c6efbfb}} 
\index{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D@{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D}!computeGradientTria3@{computeGradientTria3}}
\index{computeGradientTria3@{computeGradientTria3}!ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D@{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{computeGradientTria3()}{computeGradientTria3()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily static \mbox{\hyperlink{structReal3}{Real3}} Arcane\+Fem\+Functions\+::\+Fe\+Operation2\+D\+::compute\+Gradient\+Tria3 (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Cell}]{cell,  }\item[{const Variable\+Node\+Real3 \&}]{node\+\_\+coord,  }\item[{Variable\+Node\+Real}]{u }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}, {\ttfamily [static]}}



Computes the gradients of given function U for P1 triangles. 

This method calculates gradient operator ∇ Ui for a given P1 cell with i = 1,..,3 for the three values of Ui hence at cell nodes. The output is ∇ Ui is P0 (piece-\/wise constant) hence \mbox{\hyperlink{structReal3}{Real3}} value per cell \begin{DoxyVerb}    ∇ Ui = [ ∂U/∂𝑥   ∂U/∂𝑦   ∂U/∂𝑧 ]

    ∂U/∂𝑥 = ( u1*(y2 − y3) + u2*(y3 − y1) + u3*(y1 − y2) ) / (2*A)
    ∂U/∂𝑦 = ( u1*(x3 − x2) + u2*(x1 − x3) + u3*(x2 − x1) ) / (2*A)
    ∂U/∂𝑧 = 0
\end{DoxyVerb}
 \begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
we can adapt the same for 3D by filling the third component 
\end{DoxyNote}


Definition at line 560 of file Arcane\+Fem\+Functions.\+h.

\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_ac409be566c382b69d3107b719a1f688b}\label{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_ac409be566c382b69d3107b719a1f688b}} 
\index{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D@{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D}!computeGradientXTria3@{computeGradientXTria3}}
\index{computeGradientXTria3@{computeGradientXTria3}!ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D@{ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{computeGradientXTria3()}{computeGradientXTria3()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily static \mbox{\hyperlink{structReal3}{Real3}} Arcane\+Fem\+Functions\+::\+Fe\+Operation2\+D\+::compute\+Gradient\+XTria3 (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Cell}]{cell,  }\item[{const Variable\+Node\+Real3 \&}]{node\+\_\+coord }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}, {\ttfamily [static]}}



Computes the 𝑥 gradients of basis functions 𝐍 for ℙ1 triangles. 

This method calculates gradient operator ∂/∂𝑥 of 𝑁ᵢ for a given ℙ1 cell with i = 1,..,3 for the three shape function 𝑁ᵢ hence output is a vector of size 3 \begin{DoxyVerb}    ∂𝐍/∂𝑥 = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂𝑥  ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑥  ∂𝑁₃/∂𝑥 ]

    ∂𝐍/∂𝑥 = 1/(2𝐴) [ 𝑦₂-𝑦₃  𝑦₃-𝑦₁  𝑦₁-𝑦₂ ]
\end{DoxyVerb}
 

Definition at line 589 of file Arcane\+Fem\+Functions.\+h.

\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_aa09b12c670700a10bd61408c983b7412}\label{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1FeOperation2D_aa09b12c670700a10bd61408c983b7412}}

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{computeGradientYTria3()}{computeGradientYTria3()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily static \mbox{\hyperlink{structReal3}{Real3}} Arcane\+Fem\+Functions\+::\+Fe\+Operation2\+D\+::compute\+Gradient\+YTria3 (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Cell}]{cell,  }\item[{Variable\+Node\+Real3}]{node\+\_\+coord }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}, {\ttfamily [static]}}



Computes the 𝑦 gradients of basis functions 𝐍 for ℙ1 triangles. 

This method calculates gradient operator ∂/∂𝑦 of 𝑁ᵢ for a given ℙ1 cell with i = 1,..,3 for the three shape function 𝑁ᵢ hence output is a vector of size 3 \begin{DoxyVerb}    ∂𝐍/∂𝑦 = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂𝑦  ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑦  ∂𝑁₃/∂𝑦 ]

    ∂𝐍/∂𝑦 = 1/(2𝐴) [ 𝑥₃−𝑥₂  𝑥₁−𝑥₃  𝑥₂−𝑥₁ ]
\end{DoxyVerb}
